translation.en: I like to take a shower in the morning.

content.sentence: Tôi thích đi ___ vào buổi sáng.

notes_md:
**tắm** = to bathe or shower — to wash your whole body with water.  

It’s a verb. You can use it for regular showering or bathing in water (river, sea, bath). It also combines naturally with things like **biển, nắng, nước nóng** to show the type of bathing.  


Very close to **tắm rửa** (more general “wash up”). Don’t confuse with **giặt** (wash clothes).
exampleSentencesTranslated: After work, I usually bathe before having dinner.
I like to bathe in the morning to feel more awake.
Remember to tell the kids to bathe carefully before going to sleep.

translation.en: We should take a shower before going to bed.

content.sentence: Chúng ta nên ___ trước khi đi ngủ.

exampleSentences: Sau khi đi làm về, anh thường tắm trước khi ăn tối.
Em thích tắm vào buổi sáng để cảm thấy tỉnh táo hơn.
Chị nhớ dặn các bé tắm sạch sẽ trước khi đi ngủ nhé.
notes:
tắm = to bathe or shower — to wash your whole body with water.  

It’s a verb. You can use it for regular showering or bathing in water (river, sea, bath). It also combines naturally with things like biển, nắng, nước nóng to show the type of bathing.  

Very close to tắm rửa (more general “wash up”). Don’t confuse with giặt (wash clothes).

definitions.en: To wash oneself in water, typically in a bath or shower.
definitions.es: Lavarse en agua, típicamente en una bañera o ducha.
definitions.vi: Rửa sạch cơ thể bằng nước, thường là trong bồn tắm hoặc vòi sen.

example.vi: Tôi thích tắm vào buổi sáng.
example.en: I like to take a shower in the morning.
example.es: Me gusta ducharme por la mañana.
